fixesAppliedInIteration3.title: chatWithGemini identity bypass before mode gate
fixesAppliedInIteration3.description: Applied the same intro-question bypass (before isPremiumKnowledgeInterceptAllowed gate) to chatWithGemini that was previously only applied to _streamChatInner. Fixes identity recall for non-streaming callers (gemini-chat IPC, email body path, internal suggestion path) in technical-interview and lecture modes.

fixesAppliedInIteration3.title: Persona startup restoration wrapped in try/catch
fixesAppliedInIteration3.description: Wrapped persona DB read at startup in isolated try/catch so it cannot abort the KnowledgeOrchestrator init sequence if DatabaseManager.getPersona() throws.

fixesAppliedInIteration3.title: Remove dead GENERIC_QUESTION_PATTERNS entries subsumed by 'implement a '
fixesAppliedInIteration3.description: Removed 'implement a function ' and 'implement a class ' (now dead code since 'implement a ' was added as catch-all). Kept 'implement a ' and 'implement the '.

fixesAppliedInIteration3.title: Updated test for intro shortcut mode-gate behavior
fixesAppliedInIteration3.description: Two tests previously asserted intro shortcut was SUPPRESSED in technical-interview/lecture. Now correctly assert it PASSES THROUGH (identity recall is mode-independent). Test descriptions updated with explanatory comment.

antiHardcodingAudit.note: All fixture values appear only in tests/intelligence-fixtures/ and intelligence-eval-results/

typecheckNote: 35 pre-existing TS errors in ipcHandlers.ts, main.ts, erp-test files, preparedTranscriptContext.ts — none introduced by these changes
